help: Traps are devices and gadgets you construct to cripple your foes. By using them strategically, you can gain a great tactical advantage. Traps include ambush devises, as well as gadgets that can be constructed to aid you and your allies.
power_short_helps: Place Drone: PBAoE, Team +DEF, +Res(Hold, Immobilize, Disorient)
Place Trap: PBAoE Foe Choke, Vomit, -Regen, -Recharge
Place Bomb: PBAoE, DMG(Lethal/Fire), Foe Knockback, Special
Place Mine: PBAoE, DMG(Lethal/Fire), Foe Knockback
